project.name: Atlas Demo Workspace
project.summary: A fictional project used to test public Source-Wire memory architecture examples.

goals: Import source notes without trusting them automatically.
Prepare memory candidates for human review.
constraints: Do not include real local paths, real domains, screenshots, tokens, or private source titles.
Keep source evidence separate from trusted memory until reviewed.

decisions.title: Source evidence before trusted memory
decisions.content: Imported notes and chat messages should be preserved as source evidence before any trusted memory is created.

risks.title: Overconfident memory extraction
risks.content: A demo agent could treat every imported statement as trusted. The fixture should prove the review boundary.
